title: Rangu Rangammaa Song Lyrics Bheema
stanzas:
Rangu Rangammaa Song Lyrics Bheema
#VijayYesudas #KailasKher #Swarnalatha

Rangu rangammaa
ratham oorum thangammaa
thangu thangammaa
naan retta suzhi aalammaa (2)

aayirathil oruthi
aasayathaan koluthi
paavi nenja niruthi
kondu poraa kadathi

ye vaththi kuchi
kannadichi vanga kadal
pathikichu.

thonga ye thonga
adaraa vishilu
singaa ye singaa
ada kizhiyum sevulu.

Rangu rangammaa
ratham oorum thangammaa
thangu thangammaa
naan retta suzhi aalammaa

Rangaa rangaiyyaa
ratham oorum thangamyaa
thangu thangaiyaa
ini neeyo naano paaraiyaa

kannukkul kaththi kappal
nenjathil retta kappal
modhinaa yuththa kappal
ivathaane.

mundhaana paaimarame
mulusaana nangurame
sariyaana maalumiyum
naanthaane.

sarakke varudhu
sarukki viludhu
ye oththu nee oththu
iva oththukittaa oarangattu.

Rangu rangammaa
ratham oorum thangammaa
thangu thangammaa
naan retta suzhi aalammaa

ada Rangaa rangaiyyaa
ratham oorum thangamyaa
thangu thangaiyaa
ini neeyo naano paaraiyaa

kaaththukku route irukkaa
kadalukku poottirukkaa
vaa machaan vazhkayila
vilayaadu.

aadaatha aattamellaam
aadathaan naam porandhom
aanandha pattaikku
vazhithaedu.

maname adangu
marunaal thodangu
ye vaada nee vaadaa
nam sandhosam goli sodaa.

Rangu rangammaa
ratham oorum thangammaa
thangu thangammaa
naan retta suzhi aalammaa

ada Rangaa rangaiyyaa
ratham oorum thangamyaa
thangu thangaiyaa
ini neeyo naano paaraiyaa

aayirathil oruthi
aasayathaan koluthi
paavi nenja niruthi
kondu poraa kadathi

ye vaththi kuchi
kannadichi vanga kadal
pathikichu.

thonga ye thonga
ne adaraa vishilu
singaa ye singaa
ada kizhiyum sevul (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Rangu Rangammaa'?

The song 'Rangu Rangammaa' celebrates joy and festivity, reflecting the vibrant emotions of the characters in the movie Bheema.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Bheema, this song is a lively number that showcases the characters' celebration and camaraderie, enhancing the film's energetic vibe.

Who are the singers of 'Rangu Rangammaa'?

The song features the talented voices of Kailash Kher, Swarnalatha, and Vijay Yesudas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Rangu Rangammaa' was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was 'Rangu Rangammaa' released?

'Rangu Rangammaa' was released on January 14, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Rangu Rangammaa' from the movie Bheema is an energetic and upbeat celebration that captures the essence of joy and festivity. It features a lively collaboration of three talented singers, bringing a vibrant atmosphere that resonates with audiences. The lyrics convey a sense of happiness and togetherness, making it a perfect fit for celebrations and parties. Overall, the song evokes feelings of exuberance and excitement, enhancing the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rangu Rangammaa from Bheema is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between the soulful voices of Kailash Kher, Swarnalatha, and Vijay Yesudas. The infectious beats crafted by Harrish Jeyaraj elevate the song to a dance anthem that resonates with audiences. Dive into this musical experience that perfectly captures the essence of festivity and exuberance!
stanzaMeanings: Colorful Rangamma, the chariot is adorned, I am the one who brings joy.
In a thousand, one person has a desire, the sinful heart will take away the pain.
Hey, the beautiful one, come here, the sea is calling.
Sleep, oh sleep, the lion is roaring, oh lion, the fruits are falling.
Colorful Rangamma, the chariot is adorned, I am the one who brings joy.
Rangaa, oh Rangaiyyaa, the chariot is adorned, are you the treasure or am I the treasure?
In the eyes, there is a knife, in the heart, there are two ships, this is the battle of the ships.
The first is the great one, the second is the true one, I am the one who knows the right way.
The time is coming, the time is calling, you are the one, I am the one, we are all together.
Colorful Rangamma, the chariot is adorned, I am the one who brings joy.
Hey Rangaa, oh Rangaiyyaa, the chariot is adorned, are you the treasure or am I the treasure?
Is there a route for the call? Is there a way for the sea? Come, my friend, let’s play in life.
We are born to dance, all the games are ours, we are the ones who enjoy the joy.
Oh heart, don’t hide, let the joy begin, you say, let’s enjoy the happiness.
Colorful Rangamma, the chariot is adorned, I am the one who brings joy.
Hey Rangaa, oh Rangaiyyaa, the chariot is adorned, are you the treasure or am I the treasure?
In a thousand, one person has a desire, the sinful heart will take away the pain.
Hey, the beautiful one, come here, the sea is calling.
Sleep, oh sleep, the lion is roaring, oh lion, the fruits are falling.
